name: Laser Seed
short_description: Select blocks, stack points and ascend to the next level before the timer runs down in this satisfying puzzle clicker based on correlation discernment, block relation and aesthetic variation.
detailed_description:
Select blocks, stack points and ascend to the next level before the timer runs down.

A satisfying puzzle clicker involving block relation discernment.

  • One main play mode to master

  • 5 different aesthetic block set variations

  • Randomized aesthetic mode that mixes all blocks, border frames, and Hud variations

  • the main goal is to achieve a high score

  • Each Level begins with a full run time counter

  • When the run time counter reaches zero the game run ends

  • clicking subtracts from the run time counter in correlation to the difficulty level

  • Clicking blue and green fragments extends run time counter

  • Click a red fragment subtracts from the run time counter by one

  • ascend puzzle levels by clicking number of required amount of blue fragments

  • stack as much points as possible before ascending to the next level

  • Acquire points by clicking blocks

  • multiply points per click by efficiently clicking blocks near multiple blocks of a grouped kind
